title: PNG to JPG Converter
description: Convert PNG images into JPG format with browser-friendly optimization.

faq.question: Can I convert transparent PNGs?
faq.answer: Yes, transparent PNGs are supported, but transparency becomes a white background in JPG format.

faq.question: How do I get the converted image?
faq.answer: You will receive a downloadable JPG file after conversion.
